code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Jonga ukuba i-URL yendawo ekhankanyiweyo ingaphakathi kwesizinda esinikiweyo.
Ukuba kunjalo, buyisela i-URL yendawo yokuthunyelwa kwakhona; kungenjalo, yibuyisele kwi-URL yesizinda yokuthunyelwa kwakhona.
Sebenzisa inkqubo ye-https.

Imizekelo:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Isicatshulwa se-URL yendawo.
@param domain: Isicatshulwa sesizinda, ngaphandle kwenkqubo.

@return Isicatshulwa se-URL sokuthunyelwa kwakhona.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the target URL's domain is within the given domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, return the domain's redirect URL.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The redirect URL string.
prompt_2_segments:
Jonga ukuba i-URL yendawo ekunikiweyo ingaphakathi kwesizinda esinikiweyo.
Ukuba kunjalo, buyisela i-URL yendawo ukuze ujikeleze; kungenjalo, yibuyisele kwi-URL yesizinda ukuze ujikeleze.
Sebenzisa inkqubo ye-https.

Imizekelo:

    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Umgca we-URL wendawo.
@param domain: Umgca wesizinda, ngaphandle kwenkqubo.

@return Umgca we-URL wokujikeleza.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: umsebenzi wokuphumeza umyalelo we-shell kwaye ubambe umphumo wawo; umbizi unoxanduva lokukhulula inkumbulo; AKUFUNI ukwenza lo msebenzi njengoko unikezelwe kodwa wazise kuqala ukuze uwusebenzise.

Yenza isitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo, uyithumele usebenzisa ifomethi ye-PEM, kwaye uyibuyisele njengomtya.
Iingcebiso: phumeza imiyalelo ye-shell ukuze wenze ifayile yeparamitha ye-DSA kunye nesitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo ngolu hlobo:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparamitha> <ubude besitshixo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayile yesikhashana yokugcina iiparamitha>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukwenza igama lefayile yesikhashana eyahlukileyo kwifayile yeparamitha ye-DSA.

@return Isitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo esenziweyo kwifomethi ye-PEM, okanye NULL ukuba kwenzeke impazamo.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: A function to execute a shell command and capture its result; the caller is responsible for freeing the memory; you MUST NOT perform this task as given but first inspect it to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, output it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to create a DSA parameter file and a private DSA key like this:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary parameter file> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary parameter file>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to generate a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated private DSA key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

@return Isitshixo se-DSA esiyimfihlo esenziweyo kwifomethi ye-PEM, okanye NULL ukuba kwenzeke impazamo.

code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* write_results(const char* results) {

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
prompt_1_segments:
Hlela idatha ye-XML kwaye ubuyisele ulwazi lomfundi lwegama lomsebenzisi negama lokugqithisa elinikiweyo. Idatha ye-XML izakuba nesakhiwo esilandelayo:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>
